effort_complexity.rationale: Hermetic SIT over a cold board is exactly where the 2026-06-28 eval's twelve novel bugs lived; deterministic CI harness is genuinely hard.

design_decisions.choice: AC-01 undeclared-role clause asserts the failure at the RESOLUTION boundary (Registry.Resolve's role-arm error for an undeclared role); the conformance suite does NOT harden the four drivers' Dispatch with role re-checks. Dispatch is additionally asserted not to panic on an undeclared-role input.
options: Amend AC-01 so role rejection is asserted at the landed enforcement boundary (registry.Resolve role-arm), preserving the S01 Type-1 fail-fast-at-resolution contract that ADR-0012 records (chosen).
Harden all four drivers' Dispatch with a fail-closed Roles().Has(in.Role) guard — a production change to the S01 contract posture, outside this slice's pure-test scope.
design_decisions.human_decision: Brad (Coach), 2026-07-11 (captain-proceed.md pin 1): resolved by PROPAGATING the release's original S01 fail-fast-at-resolution Type-1 decision, not a new ruling; AC-01 amended on release-wt @32328e5 and forward-merged to this track.
design_decisions.rationale: Capability IS the declared role set; resolution checks it before ever dispatching. Re-checking in Dispatch would amend ADR-0012's deliberately-disclaimed posture from a test slice.

design_decisions.choice: D1 — drivertest.Run takes a fresh-driver factory (func() driver.Driver), not a driver instance, so no subtest's dispatch leaks state into the next.
design_decisions.rationale: Matches the constructor shape every driver already exposes; callers close over their fake-binary path or httptest URL.

design_decisions.choice: D4 — one exported StubDriver in drivertest is both the fifth conformance subject and the SIT's dispatched driver, with per-role scripted outputs (captain design-TL;DR/review/reqverify legs plus implement/verify) so the SIT stub can never silently diverge from what conformance certified.
design_decisions.rationale: Divergence between 'what conformance certified' and 'what the SIT dispatches' is exactly the anti-leaf-mocking failure mode this slice encodes (Captain pin 8).

design_decisions.choice: D7 — TestLoopSIT leaves MergeTrackFn nil (auto-skip): AC-03's boundary is 'at least one slice reaches verified', not 'track merged'.
design_decisions.rationale: Confirmed by Captain review pin 7 from the spec's verbatim wording; pulling merge in would make a stall ambiguous between loop failure and merge failure.

design_decisions.choice: In-process drivers' conformance wiring goes via fake credentials + SWORN_PROXY_URL (the landed S06 ProxyRoute seam) to reach the httptest server; no exported client-factory seam is added.
design_decisions.rationale: Coach disposition 3: the proxy route is the honest, already-tested seam with zero production edits; an exported seam would be a declared touchpoint divergence taken only if the proxy route proves insufficient.

design_decisions.choice: conformance_all_test.go enrolment is fail-closed detection: iterate Registry.Drivers() for registered names, look each up in a test-owned name->factory map (fresh fake-wired drivers), and fail loudly on any registered name missing from the map.
design_decisions.rationale: Drivers() returns []Info, not instances, so zero-edit auto-enrolment is impossible; fail-closed detection preserves AC-02's intent that a newly registered driver cannot ship unenrolled silently (Coach disposition 4).

design_decisions.choice: No RequiresWorktree opt-out knob: the Rule-11 worktree clause is mandatory for every driver.
design_decisions.rationale: All four registered drivers AssertWorktree unconditionally, so the knob is dead configuration at birth; a future transport-less driver failing the clause is the R-02 surface-to-human path (Coach disposition 5).
